AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 150 

SR_CORE_TRNSPRTN_1_SW 

LABEL: Core HRSN Transportation 1: Lack of Reliable Transportation 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) lack of reliable transportation for medical 
appointments, meetings, work, or from getting to things needed for daily living. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_TRNSPRTN_1_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system
